title: LR-133
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: The Lord is the strength of his people, a saving refuge for the one he has anointed. Save your people, Lord, ad bless your heritage, and govern them for ever.

title: Responsorial Psalm
author: Psalm 69: 8-10, 14, 17, 33-35
snippet: Lord, in your great love, answer me.

title: Gospel Acclamation
author: John: 15:26b, 27a
snippet: The Spirit of truth will testify to me, says the Lord; and you also will testify.

title: Keep Me in Your Heart
author: Janèt Sullivan Whitaker
snippet: Jesus, hold me in peace; keep me in your heart.  Let me know your mercy; keep me in your heart.  Jesus, you are my hope. Help me when the darkness comes. In your kindness, keep me in your heart.

title: LR-135
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: I am the Good Shepherd, and I lay down my life for my sheep, says the Lord.

title: The Goodness of the Lord
author: Scott Soper
snippet: I believe, I believe, I shall see the goodness of the Lord in the land, in the land of the living.

title: Shepherd Me, O God
author: Marty Haugen
snippet: Shepherd me, O God, beyond my wants, beyond my fears, from death into life.

title: We Ever Will Praise You
author: Agnus McDonell
snippet: We ever will praise you; We ever will sing Sweet psalms of joy; To You, our King O Maker of heaven; Of earth and the sea Sweet psalms of joy ; We ever will sing

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
